name: David Fravor
summary: Retired U.S. Navy commander, firsthand witness to the 2004 Nimitz encounter, and congressional witness.

relationships.context: Testified publicly under oath about the 2004 Nimitz encounter
Commanded the flight that visually encountered the Tic Tac object
Long-form public interview focused on the Nimitz encounter
His Nimitz account entered broad public reporting

profileStatus: Firsthand military witness and congressional witness
profileSummary: Retired U.S. Navy commander, firsthand witness to the 2004 Nimitz encounter, and congressional witness.
background: Retired U.S. Navy commander and former commanding officer of Strike Fighter Squadron 41.
inclusionNote: Included because of firsthand involvement in the 2004 Nimitz encounter, official congressional testimony, written testimony, and documented public interviews.
